---
title: "Funnel plot in R"
author: "Henrik Hedevik, adapted for NORspine by Bjørnar Berg"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
note: Requires prepared NORspine data restricted to time-period and surgical cases of interest (long format)
variables needed: success (dep.var), clinic (shnavn), covariates: alder, kjonn, asa, prevsurg(binar), oswtotpre
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

### Installation of packages

```{r packages, echo=FALSE}
#if(!require(foreign)) { install.packages("foreign"); require(foreign)}
#library(foreign)
if(!require(ggplot2)) { install.packages("ggplot2"); require(ggplot2)}
library(ggplot2)
if(!require(dplyr)) { install.packages("dplyr"); require(dplyr)}
library(dplyr)
if(!require(broom)) { install.packages("broom"); require(broom)}
library(broom)
if(!require(data.table)) { install.packages("data.table"); require(data.table)}
library(data.table)
if(!require(emmeans)) { install.packages("emmeans"); require(emmeans)}
library(emmeans)
library(haven) 
library(dplyr)
library(ggrepel)
```
### Loading data LR

```{r data, echo=FALSE}
LR <- read_dta("M:/p2124-bjbe/NORspine/Rygg/funnel/funnel_hd2223.dta") # Imports Stata .dta file
setDT(LR)
LR <- LR %>%
  mutate(
    kjonn = recode(as.numeric(kjonn), `1` = 0, `2` = 1), # Recode kjonn
    prevsurg = as.numeric(prevsurg), # Ensure binary as numeric
    success = as.numeric(success),  # Ensure binary as numeric
    asa = as.numeric(asa),          # Convert labelled numeric
    alder = as.numeric(alder),      # Already numeric, but ensures consistency
    oswtotpre = as.numeric(oswtotpre), # Already numeric
  )
View(LR)

```

### Data Table LPHD

```{r LPHD_LogReg, echo=FALSE}

# Selecting HD
LPHD <- LR

# Calculate Clinic Volume and Satisfied patients
LPHD <- copy(LPHD) 
LPHD[, ClinicVolume := .N, by = clinic]
LPHD[, Success := sum(success), by = clinic]

# Include Clinics with >20 surgeries
LPHD <- LPHD[ClinicVolume > 20]

LPHD[, MeanAge := mean(alder)]
LPHD[, MeanSex := mean(kjonn)]
LPHD[, meanPrevsurg := mean(prevsurg)]
LPHD[, MeanAsa := mean(asa)]
LPHD[, meanOswTotPre := mean(oswtotpre)]
LPHD

# Logistic Regression model on Success
LPHD_Model <- glm(success ~ clinic + alder + kjonn + prevsurg + asa + oswtotpre, family = binomial, data = LPHD)
summary(LPHD_Model)

# Calculate EMMs for Clinic on the response scale
LPHD_EMMs <- emmeans(LPHD_Model, ~ clinic, type = "response")

# View the EMMs on the response scale
summary(LPHD_EMMs)

# Extract EMMs as a data.table
LPHD_Prob <- as.data.table(summary(LPHD_EMMs))

# Merge EMMs with the original data table
LPHD <- merge(LPHD, LPHD_Prob, by = "clinic", all.x = TRUE)
LPHD[, SuccessAdj := ClinicVolume*prob]

# Exclude duplicate cases in Clinic
LPHD_Clinic <- LPHD[, .(clinic, ClinicVolume, Success, SuccessAdj)][!duplicated(clinic)]

# Calculate Satisfaction Rates
LPHD_Clinic <- LPHD_Clinic %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Rate = Success/ClinicVolume,
                OverallRate = sum(Success)/sum(ClinicVolume),
                se = sqrt(OverallRate * ((1 - OverallRate)/ClinicVolume)),
                lcl95 =  OverallRate - (1.96 * se),
                ucl95 =  OverallRate + (1.96 * se),
                RateAdj = SuccessAdj/ClinicVolume,
                OverallRateAdj = sum(SuccessAdj)/sum(ClinicVolume),
                seAdj = sqrt(OverallRateAdj * ((1 - OverallRateAdj)/ClinicVolume)),
                lcl95Adj =  OverallRateAdj - (1.96 * seAdj),
                ucl95Adj =  OverallRateAdj + (1.96 * seAdj))
View(LPHD_Clinic)

```

### Funnel plot Satisfaction (%) LPHD

```{r LPHD_Plot, echo=FALSE}
# Funnel plot on satisfaction (%) with improved label placement
PlotRate <- ggplot(data = LPHD_Clinic, aes(x = ClinicVolume, group = OverallRate)) +
  geom_smooth(aes(y = ucl95), se = FALSE, linetype = "solid", color = "red", size = 0.8) +
  geom_smooth(aes(y = lcl95), se = FALSE, linetype = "solid", color = "red", size = 0.8) +
  geom_smooth(aes(y = OverallRate), se = FALSE, color = "darkgray", size = 0.8) +
  geom_point(aes(y = Rate), color = "black", size = 2) +
  geom_text_repel(aes(y = Rate, label = clinic), 
                  size = 2.5, color = "black", 
                  box.padding = 0.4, # Adds padding between labels and points
                  point.padding = 0.2, # Adds padding between points and lines
                  max.overlaps = 10, # Adjusts the number of overlapping labels allowed
                  min.segment.length = 0.2, # Avoids long connecting lines
                  segment.color = "gray") + # Sets line color
  theme_classic() +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 400, by = 50), limits = c(0, 410)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0.20, 1, by = 0.05), labels = scales::percent) +
  labs(x = "Patient volume during surgery period 2022-2023",
       y = "Success (%)")

# Display the plot
PlotRate

# Save the plot to a PDF file
ggsave("Funnel_plot_success(HD).pdf", plot = PlotRate, width = 10, height = 6)

# Funnel plot on satisfaction adjusted (%)
PlotRateAdj <- ggplot(data = LPHD_Clinic, aes(x = ClinicVolume, group = OverallRateAdj)) +
     geom_smooth(aes(y=lcl95Adj), se=FALSE, linetype="solid", color="red", size=0.8) +
     geom_smooth(aes(y=ucl95Adj), se=FALSE, linetype="solid", color="red", size=0.8) +
     geom_smooth(aes(y=OverallRateAdj), se=FALSE, color="darkgray", size=0.8) +
     geom_point(aes(y = Rate), color = "black", size = 2) +
     geom_text_repel(aes(y = Rate, label = clinic), 
                size = 2.5, color = "black", 
                box.padding = 0.4, # Adds padding between labels and points
                point.padding = 0.2, # Adds padding between points and lines
                max.overlaps = 10, # Adjusts the number of overlapping labels allowed
                min.segment.length = 0.2, # Avoids long connecting lines
                segment.color = "gray") + # Sets line color
  theme_classic() +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 400, by = 50), limits = c(0, 410)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(0.20, 1, by=0.05), labels=scales::percent) +
  labs(x = "Patient volume during surgery period 2022-2023",
       y = "Success, adjusted (%)")
PlotRateAdj

# Save the plot to a PDF file
ggsave("Funnel_plot_success_adjusted(HD).pdf", plot = PlotRateAdj, width = 10, height = 6)

```
### Data Table LLSS
# From Henrik, NOT adapted
```{r LLSS_LogReg, echo=FALSE}

# Selecting LLSS
LLSS <- LR[LR$Diagnosis == "3 – Lateral spinal stenos/recess stenos (M48.8K)",]

# Calculate Clinic Volume and Satisfied patients
LLSS[, ClinicVolume := .N, by = Clinic]
LLSS[, Satisfaction := sum(SatisfactionSurgery), by = Clinic]

# Include Clinics with >10 LLSS surgeries
LLSS <- LLSS[ClinicVolume > 10]

LLSS[, MeanAge := mean(Age)]
LLSS[, MeanSex := mean(Sex)]

# Logistic Regression model on Satisfaction
LLSS_Model <- glm(SatisfactionSurgery ~ Clinic + Age + Sex, family = binomial, data = LLSS)
summary(LLSS_Model)


# R kode er brukt.


# Calculate EMMs for Clinic on the response scale
LLSS_EMMs <- emmeans(LLSS_Model, ~ Clinic, type = "response")

# View the EMMs on the response scale
summary(LLSS_EMMs)

# Extract EMMs as a data.table
LLSS_Prob <- as.data.table(summary(LLSS_EMMs))

# Merge EMMs with the original data table
LLSS <- merge(LLSS, LLSS_Prob, by = "Clinic", all.x = TRUE)
LLSS[, SatisfactionAdj := ClinicVolume*prob]

# Exclude duplicate cases in Clinic
LLSS_Clinic <- LLSS[, .(Clinic, ClinicVolume, Satisfaction, SatisfactionAdj)][!duplicated(Clinic)]

# Calculate Satisfaction Rates
LLSS_Clinic <- LLSS_Clinic %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Rate = Satisfaction/ClinicVolume,
                OverallRate = sum(Satisfaction)/sum(ClinicVolume),
                se = sqrt(OverallRate * ((1 - OverallRate)/ClinicVolume)),
                lcl95 =  OverallRate - (1.96 * se),
                ucl95 =  OverallRate + (1.96 * se),
                RateAdj = SatisfactionAdj/ClinicVolume,
                OverallRateAdj = sum(SatisfactionAdj)/sum(ClinicVolume),
                seAdj = sqrt(OverallRateAdj * ((1 - OverallRateAdj)/ClinicVolume)),
                lcl95Adj =  OverallRateAdj - (1.96 * seAdj),
                ucl95Adj =  OverallRateAdj + (1.96 * seAdj))
View(LLSS_Clinic)

```

### Funnel plot Satisfaction (%) LLSS

```{r LLSS_Plot, echo=FALSE}

# Funnel plot on satisfaction (%)
PlotRate <- ggplot(data = LLSS_Clinic, aes(x = ClinicVolume, group = OverallRate)) +
     geom_smooth(aes(y=lcl95), se=FALSE, linetype="solid", color="red", linewidth=0.8) +
     geom_smooth(aes(y=ucl95), se=FALSE, linetype="solid", color="red", linewidth=0.8) +
     geom_smooth(aes(y=OverallRate), se=FALSE, color="darkgray", linewidth=0.8) +
     geom_point(aes(y=Rate), color="black") +
     geom_text(aes(y=Rate, label=Clinic), color="black", size=2.5, hjust=-0.3, vjust=-0.3) +
     geom_label(aes(x=150, y=0.95, label="Red line indicate 95% CI")) +
     theme_classic() +
     scale_x_continuous(breaks=seq(0,300, by=50)) +
     scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(0.20,1, by=0.05), labels=scales::percent) +
     labs(title="Lumbal Lateral Spinal Stenosis") +
     labs(x="Patient volume during surgery period 2021-2022") +
     labs(y="Satisfaction (%)")
PlotRate

# Save the plot to a PDF file
ggsave("Funnel plot satisfaction (LLSS).pdf", plot = PlotRate, width = 10, height = 6)

# Funnel plot on satisfaction adjusted (%)
PlotRateAdj <- ggplot(data = LLSS_Clinic, aes(x = ClinicVolume, group = OverallRateAdj)) +
     geom_smooth(aes(y=lcl95Adj), se=FALSE, linetype="solid", color="red", linewidth=0.8) +
     geom_smooth(aes(y=ucl95Adj), se=FALSE, linetype="solid", color="red", linewidth=0.8) +
     geom_smooth(aes(y=OverallRateAdj), se=FALSE, color="darkgray", linewidth=0.8) +
     geom_point(aes(y=RateAdj), color="black") +
     geom_text(aes(y=RateAdj, label=Clinic), color="black", size=2.5, hjust=-0.3, vjust=-0.3) +
     geom_label(aes(x=150, y=0.95, label="Red line indicate 95% CI")) +
     theme_classic() +
     scale_x_continuous(breaks=seq(0,300, by=50)) +
     scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(0.20,1, by=0.05), labels=scales::percent) +
     labs(title="Lumbal Lateral Spinal Stenosis") +
     labs(x="Patient volume during surgery period 2021-2022") +
     labs(y="Satisfaction, adjusted (%)")
PlotRateAdj

# Save the plot to a PDF file
ggsave("Funnel plot satisfaction adjusted (LLSS).pdf", plot = PlotRateAdj, width = 10, height = 6)

```
